label: Reconnaissance faciale
description: occurs when the device recognizes a registered face.

userList.label: User List
userList.description: A Json representation of the current recognizable set. This is a JSON array of objects containing ``label`` and ``id``. This is a sample format. ``[{"id":"<id>","label":"<label>"},{}..]``

faceRecognizedEvent.label: Reconnaissance faciale
faceRecognizedEvent.description: ID and Label are passed through. The Id ``notRegisteredUser`` is reserved for unknown face detection.
